name: sessfix
description: Detect and non-destructively recover RDP sessions wedged/blocked by Local Session Manager.
author: djdarcy
notes: First category of the wtf-rdp aggregator. Shipping: status (read-only), query (session diagnostic), install (NSSM LocalSystem watchdog service), recover (manual tscon + lock), logs (watchdog log viewer), config (get/set watchdog params), uninstall. The rescue logic lives in the shared lib/WtfRdp.Sessions.psm1 module.
